subcodes.title: Words to a vistor, spoken on 1913-04-20
subcodes.first_line: Well said. You have brought up a good point.... The Bahá'í movement is not an organization. You can never organize the Bahá'í Cause.... The Bahá'í Revelation is the spirit of this age.
subcodes.subjects: @universality of the Cause, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @words vs deeds, @executive government; power of execution, @oneness; unity of religion, @The Holy Spirit
